# Extracao: transcription_mp4_06__Commitment

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_06__Commitment.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

You've now completed the why discovery course. We hope you feel as inspired as we did when we discovered our why. Here's the thing, consistency is just as important as intensity. While this course has been an intense experience, real impact comes from consistency. It's kind of like working out. If you work out for 10 hours straight, you won't get in shape. But if you go to the gym and work out every day for 20 minutes, you will. It's all the small, purposeful actions that produce meaningful results. It's the same thing for your why. If you take consistent actions towards your why every day, you'll bring your why to life. Starting new habits can be difficult. So we've created a tool to help the habit changer. You can opt in to receive emails that include tips and ideas to help you bring your why to life and to practice thinking, acting and communicating, starting with why. While the journey to discover, articulate and bring your why to life belongs to you, something we know is that together is better. You went on this journey with a partner and perhaps included a couple of your closest friends along the way. As you find a greater sense of fulfillment in your own life, you may just inspire others to do the same.
